summary: The stock has both bullish and bearish factors, with a neutral signal due to the conflicting indicators.
bullish_factors: Price is above the 20-day moving average.
MACD is above its signal line, indicating positive momentum.
The stock has positive 5-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: The 20-day moving average is below the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is below the 26-day EMA, suggesting weak momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
